goal: Fix install.sh to copy scripts and skip settings.json, harden deny rules, restrict review agent tools

tasks.name: Fix install.sh
tasks.action: Add scripts/ copy section, skip settings.json if exists, quote basenames

tasks.name: Harden permission deny rules
tasks.action: Add deny rules for rm -rf ., force push, docker privileged, terraform destroy, sensitive file bash access, curl/wget exfiltration

tasks.name: Remove Bash from review agents
tasks.action: Change tools from 'Read, Grep, Glob, Bash' to 'Read, Grep, Glob'

commitMessage: fix(review-findings-remediation): installer fixes, security hardening, agent restrictions
